title: Copy subitems
excerpt: When I am selecting an Item name from a column connected to another board, i would like to copy the subitems from the item in the original board to the new item in which the connected cell is.

posts.author: jmsavary (JM)
posts.cookedHtml: When I am selecting an Item name from a column connected to another board, i would like to copy the subitems from the item in the original board to the new item in which the connected cell is.

posts.author: kevinfantasymedia (Kevin - Fantasy Media LTD)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jmsavary

I might be able to help you with that. Would you mind giving us a bit more details on the flow that you want? I don’t think what you’re trying to achieve is doable natively, but I think it can be achieved if you’re willing to alter it a little bit.

Instead of copying subitems from a connected item AFTER the connection is established, how about if you create the item and copy the subitems first, then connect the two parent items afterwards? Wouldn’t that be the more logical option?

We have these automations in the Subitem Automations app that might be of use to you.

image2252×694 32.2 KB

image2292×764 57.3 KB

Hope this helps!
